steps.title: Identify what the goal requires
steps.content: The student wants to provide an example of a country that uses “dinar” in its currency name. This requires a specific country. The notes contain exactly one such example: Bahrain's Bahraini dinar.

steps.title: Select the choice that provides the example
steps.content: Choice A provides the specific country example—Bahrain uses the Bahraini dinar. The other choices either generalize without naming a specific country (C), explain the etymology of “dinar” (D), or state a negative claim about Bahrain (B). That matches choice A — A is correct.
